bridge-type.label: 3CX PBX Server
bridge-type.description: 3CX PBX V20 server connection via xAPI — monitors calls, extensions, and trunks

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname
parameter.description: 3CX server hostname or IP address

parameter.name: port
parameter.label: Port
parameter.description: 3CX webclient API port (default: 5001)

parameter.name: username
parameter.label: Username
parameter.description: 3CX xAPI username (extension number with admin role)

parameter.name: password
parameter.label: Password
parameter.description: 3CX xAPI password

parameter.name: pollInterval
parameter.label: Poll Interval
parameter.description: Active calls polling interval in seconds

parameter.name: presenceInterval
parameter.label: Presence Interval
parameter.description: Extension presence polling interval in seconds

parameter.name: trunkInterval
parameter.label: Trunk Interval
parameter.description: Trunk status polling interval in seconds

parameter.name: verifySsl
parameter.label: Verify SSL
parameter.description: Verify SSL certificates (disable for self-signed 3CX certs)

parameter.name: webhookPort
parameter.label: Webhook Port
parameter.description: Port for incoming CRM/CFD webhook listener (0 = disabled)

parameter.name: recentCallsMax
parameter.label: Recent Calls Max
parameter.description: Maximum number of recent calls to keep in history

parameter.name: recentMissedCallsMax
parameter.label: Missed Calls Max
parameter.description: Maximum number of missed calls to keep in history

parameter.name: sipServer
parameter.label: SIP Server
parameter.description: SIP server hostname or IP for baresip registration

parameter.name: sipExtension
parameter.label: SIP Extension
parameter.description: SIP extension number for baresip (e.g. 600)

parameter.name: sipAuthUser
parameter.label: SIP Auth User
parameter.description: SIP authentication username

parameter.name: sipAuthPass
parameter.label: SIP Auth Password
parameter.description: SIP authentication password

parameter.name: sipAlertExtensions
parameter.label: Alert Extensions
parameter.description: Comma-separated phone numbers to call for alarms (e.g. +45XXXXXXXX,+45YYYYYYYY)

parameter.name: sipMaxRingTime
parameter.label: Max Ring Time
parameter.description: Maximum seconds to wait for answer before trying next number

parameter.name: sipAudioPath
parameter.label: Alert Audio Path
parameter.description: Directory containing alert WAV files (towing_alert.wav, unplug_alert.wav, etc.)

parameter.name: makeCallDuration
parameter.label: Call Duration
parameter.description: Default duration in seconds for plain SIP calls

thing-type.label: 3CX Extension
thing-type.description: A 3CX phone extension with status and presence tracking

parameter.name: extensionNumber
parameter.label: Extension Number
parameter.description: The 3CX extension number (e.g. 200, 201)

thing-type.label: 3CX Ring Group
thing-type.description: A 3CX ring group with member tracking

parameter.name: ringGroupNumber
parameter.label: Ring Group Number
parameter.description: The 3CX ring group number (e.g. 803, 804)

thing-type.label: 3CX Call Queue
thing-type.description: A 3CX call queue with agent tracking and waiting caller count

parameter.name: queueNumber
parameter.label: Queue Number
parameter.description: The 3CX queue number (e.g. 808, 809)

channel-type.label: Call State
channel-type.description: Current call state: idle, ringing, active, outgoing

channel-type.label: Caller Number
channel-type.description: Phone number of the current/last caller

channel-type.label: Caller Name
channel-type.description: Display name of the current/last caller

channel-type.label: Called Number
channel-type.description: The destination number being called

channel-type.label: Call Direction
channel-type.description: Call direction: inbound, outbound, internal

channel-type.label: Call Duration
channel-type.description: Duration of the last call in seconds

channel-type.label: Call Agent
channel-type.description: Extension handling the call

channel-type.label: Call Timestamp
channel-type.description: Timestamp of the current/last call event

channel-type.label: Missed Calls Today
channel-type.description: Number of missed calls since midnight

channel-type.label: Total Calls Today
channel-type.description: Total number of calls since midnight

channel-type.label: Last Missed Caller
channel-type.description: Number of the last missed caller

channel-type.label: Last Missed Time
channel-type.description: When the last missed call occurred

channel-type.label: Active Calls
channel-type.description: Number of currently active calls

channel-type.label: Active Calls JSON
channel-type.description: JSON array of all currently active calls with full detail

channel-type.label: Recent Calls JSON
channel-type.description: JSON array of the last 10 completed calls with full detail

channel-type.label: Recent Missed Calls JSON
channel-type.description: JSON array of the last 10 unanswered inbound calls

channel-type.label: Trunk Status
channel-type.description: SIP trunk status summary (e.g. 2/3 online)

channel-type.label: Recording URL
channel-type.description: URL of the last call recording

channel-type.label: System Status
channel-type.description: PBX system status: ONLINE, OFFLINE, ERROR

channel-type.label: Make Call
channel-type.description: Place a SIP call via baresip. Send destination number (e.g. 200, +4512345678)

channel-type.label: Alarm Call
channel-type.description: Place an alarm call with audio and DTMF confirmation. Format: alertType or alertType,destination (e.g. towing, unplug,+45XXXXXXXX)

channel-type.label: Alarm Call Result
channel-type.description: Result of the last alarm call: CONFIRMED, NO_RESPONSE, ERROR, IN_PROGRESS, IDLE

channel-type.label: Extension Status
channel-type.description: Call status: available, oncall, away, dnd, offline

channel-type.label: Presence Profile
channel-type.description: 3CX presence profile: Available, Away, DND, Custom

channel-type.label: Extension Name
channel-type.description: Registered display name of the extension user

channel-type.label: Registered
channel-type.description: Whether the extension is registered (phone connected)

channel-type.label: Ring Group Name
channel-type.description: Name of the ring group

channel-type.label: Ring Strategy
channel-type.description: Ring strategy: Hunt, RingAll, Paging

channel-type.label: Members
channel-type.description: Comma-separated list of ring group members (extension numbers and names)

channel-type.label: Member Count
channel-type.description: Number of members in the ring group

channel-type.label: Registered
channel-type.description: Whether the ring group is registered on the PBX

channel-type.label: Queue Name
channel-type.description: Name of the call queue

channel-type.label: Polling Strategy
channel-type.description: Queue polling strategy: Hunt, RingAll

channel-type.label: Agents
channel-type.description: Comma-separated list of queue agents (extension numbers and names)

channel-type.label: Agent Count
channel-type.description: Number of agents in the queue

channel-type.label: Waiting Callers
channel-type.description: Number of callers waiting in the queue

channel-type.label: Registered
channel-type.description: Whether the queue is registered on the PBX
